label: Serial founder, scaled then sold
careerText: Founder & CEO, Northwind Labs (2014-2023): built a logistics-software company from nothing to 140 employees, raised three rounds, sold to a strategic acquirer. Founder, two earlier startups (2008-2014), one acquihired, one shut down. Started as a product analyst at a big-box retailer (2006-2008).
